sentences.arabic: زُرْتُ مَسْجِدًا تَارِيخِيًّا فِي الْمَدِينَةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetio sam historijsku džamiju u starom dijelu grada.
sentences.translationEn: I visited a historic mosque in the old part of the city.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمَسْجِدُ كَبِيرًا وَتَعْلُوهُ مَنَارَةٌ عَالِيَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Džamija je bila velika s visokim minaretom iznad nje.
sentences.translationEn: The mosque was large with a tall minaret above it.

sentences.arabic: خَلَعْتُ حِذَائِي عِنْدَ الْبَابِ وَدَخَلْتُ بِهُدُوءٍ وَاحْتِرَامٍ.
sentences.translation: Izuo sam cipele kod vrata i ušao tiho i s poštovanjem.
sentences.translationEn: I took off my shoes at the door and entered quietly and respectfully.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسْتُ لِدَقَائِقَ أَسْتَمِعُ إِلَى الصَّمْتِ وَالطُّمَأْنِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Sjedio sam nekoliko minuta slušajući tišinu i spokojstvo.
sentences.translationEn: I sat for a few minutes listening to the silence and tranquillity.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الزِّيَارَةُ تَجْرِبَةً رُوحِيَّةً هَادِئَةً لَا أَنْسَاهَا.
sentences.translation: Posjet je bio mirno duhovno iskustvo koje neću zaboraviti.
sentences.translationEn: The visit was a quiet spiritual experience I will not forget.
